name: Project: Planet Creation
description:
The year is 2031, Human technology has advanced even further into the future. During this time frame, you have been selected by the Galactic Planet Protection Society (G.P.P.S) to be sent to a barren planet among the galaxies and have been given the necessary tools to start your assigned task- make a flourishing ecosystem and to protect both yourself and your chosen planet from any dangerous challenges that lie ahead. Are you ready to begin?

(Image generated from Perchance Ai)

(Any helpful feedback is appreciated, enjoy!)
